segments.text: best to do it in a run if you're nervous. I'm ready!
Harry and Lily put their heads on Albus's trolley,
Ginny joins James's trolley, and together the family run hand-in-hand
into the barrier. Act one, scene two,
platform nine and three-quarters, which is covered in a thick
white steam pouring from the Hogwarts Express, and which is also
busy, but instead of people in sharp suits going about their day,
it is now wizards and witches and rogues mostly trying to work out how to say
goodbye to their beloved progeny. Albus, this is it!
Lily, wow! Platform nine and three-quarters,
where are they? Are they here? Maybe they didn't come.
Harry points out Ron, Hermione, and their daughter, Rose.
Lily runs up to them. Uncle Ron!
Uncle Ron! Ron turned towards Lily as Lily goes barreling up to him.
He picks her up in his arms. If it isn't my favorite, Potter,
have you gotten my trick? Are you aware of
